name: GoogleDriveConnector
description: Connects to the Google Drive API v3 to list, fetch, and sync files and shared drives, with OAuth2 authorization and SHA-256 stable document IDs.

install_fields.label: OAuth2 Client ID
install_fields.help: Found in Google Cloud Console → APIs & Services → Credentials → OAuth 2.0 Client IDs

install_fields.label: OAuth2 Client Secret
install_fields.help: Found alongside the Client ID in Google Cloud Console. Stored encrypted.

install_fields.label: Redirect URI
install_fields.help: The OAuth2 redirect URI registered in Google Cloud Console. Leave blank to use the platform default.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates client_id and client_secret and marks the connector as installed. Call before OAuth authorization.

apis.name: Get Authorization URL
apis.description: Returns the Google OAuth2 authorization URL with drive.readonly and userinfo.email scopes. Redirect the user to this URL to start the OAuth flow.

apis.name: Exchange Authorization Code
apis.description: Exchanges an OAuth2 authorization code for access and refresh tokens. Called by the platform after the user completes the Google consent screen.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Checks Google Drive API connectivity by calling GET /about?fields=user. Returns the authenticated user email on success.

apis.name: Sync Files
apis.description: Pages through all Drive files via nextPageToken, normalizes each to a ConnectorDocument, and ingests into the Shielva knowledge base.

apis.name: List Files
apis.description: Lists Drive files with optional query filter and pagination via nextPageToken. Returns raw API response.

apis.name: Get File
apis.description: Fetches full metadata for a single Drive file by ID using fields=*.

apis.name: List Shared Drives
apis.description: Lists all shared drives accessible to the authenticated user.

apis.name: Export File
apis.description: Exports a Google Docs/Sheets/Slides file to a specified MIME type (e.g. text/plain, application/pdf) and returns raw bytes.
